creator: markm@iafrica.com
text:
1) If you do not have MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE set, this port tries
to get (and tar-up) the needed sources. These sources do not exist
at the master sites anymore.

2) If MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE _is_ set (to freefall), the the tarball
is fetched from there, bit bsd.port.mk complains about the confict
between the ${IGNORE} in the makefile and the MD5 checksum in
files/md5.

Fix: 

:-) No time to do it myself.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/distfiles
rm xfed.tar.*
cd /usr/ports/x11/xfed
make fetch
make checksum
